data.body: STORY F ff6f round-5 review PASSED + CERTIFIED attestation (verify-signature exit 0; empty stdout = same flush artifact as story A). Converged after comprehensive remediation across rounds 1-5 (certified-badge dropped; AC/description-path fixes; four-pass scoped to plan-review w/ code-review graceful degradation; v1/v2 tolerance; operator-attested met-path; decision value set corrected; convergence series/oracle + round-param indexing + CODE-gate derivation specified). Claiming F now; it stacks on top of story A's commit 8628d22a4 (server.py already present) in the worktree.
